MINISTRY OF RAILWAYS (RAILWAY BOARD) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27th August, 2018 G.S.R. 816(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by clauses (c), (e), (f) and (g) of sub-section (2) of section 30 of the Railway Claims Tribunal Act, 1987 (54 of 1987), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989, namely :— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules, 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1989, in Schedule 1(A), for serial number (3) and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely:— (1) (2) (3) (4) (5) “3. South Zone Vice Chairman (Judicial) Secunderabad Amaravti Bengaluru Chennai Ermakulam Secunderabad”. [F.No. 2016/TC(RCT)/1-13] VIVEK SRIVASTAVA, Exe. Dir. (Public Grievances) -- 2 of 3 -- [art I—avs 3(i)] YR AT USTIA : STATA Note : The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part IT, Section 3, Sub-section (4), vide notification number G.S.R. 842(E), dated the 19" September, 1989 and subsequently amended as follows:— CANUMBR WN © G.S.R 700 (E), dated the 26"" November, 1991; G.S.R. 438 (E), dated the 28" April, 1992; G.S.R. 509 (E), dated the 15"" June, 1994; G.S.R. 270 (E), dated the gn July, 1996; G.S.R. 59 (E), dated the 6" February, 1997; G.S.R. 719 (E), dated the 26" October, 1999; G.S.R. 167 (E), dated the 29 February, 2000; G.S.R. 513 (BE), dated the 9" July, 2001; G.S.R. 787 (E), dated the 2nd December, 2002; G.S.R. 384 (E), dated the 1‘ November, 2003; G.S.R. 66 (E), dated the 16" February, 2006; G.S.R. 498(E), dated the 23" August, 2006; G.S.R.283(E), dated the 11™ April, 2007; G.S.R.96(E), dated the 29nd February, 2010; G.S.R.711(E), dated the 17 September, 2015; G.S.R.464(E), dated the 28" April, 2016. G.S.R.332(E), dated the 5" April, 2017, and G.S.R.1060(E), dated the 23 August, 2017.
